title: Signals and Systems
summary: This page contains three drill exercises covering energy, power, and RMS value computations for various signals. Drill 1.1 asks students to verify energies of signals shown in figures and compute power and RMS values. Drills 1.2 and 1.3 involve computing power of sinusoids over a period and analyzing the power of a sum of two equal-frequency sinusoids, demonstrating that power of a sum is not simply the sum of individual powers when frequencies are equal.

figures.caption: Various signal waveforms including rectangular pulses, ramp, sawtooth, and decaying exponential signals used for Drill 1.1 exercises on energy, power, and rms values.
